notes: Times are minutes from midnight (540 = 9:00 AM, 1440 = end of day).
Replace this file when the club issues a new rules table.
table[i].cells stores the human-readable cell text (verbatim from the printed table).

table.category: Full, Life, Non-Resident, National, Sub-Full, Golf Members

cells.Tuesday: May play anytime from 11:00am to end of day
cells.Thursday: May play before 10:30am and from 12:00pm to end of day
cells.Friday: Full & Life may play anytime. Non-Resident, National & Sub-Full before 9:00am & from 12:00pm to end of day

cells.Thursday: May play before 8:40am and from 12:00pm to end of day
cells.Friday: May play before 9am then only with their spouse until 12:00pm and anytime after 1:00pm
cells.Saturday: May play from 11:00am to end of day
cells.Sunday: May play from 9:00am to end of day
cells.Holidays: May play from 9:00am to end of day

cells.Tuesday: May play from 11:00am to end of day
cells.Thursday: May play before 8:40am and from 12:00pm to end of day
cells.Friday: May play before 9am then only with their Full or Life parent until 12:00pm and anytime after 1:00pm
cells.Saturday: May play from 11:00am to end of day
cells.Sunday: May play from 9:00am to end of day
cells.Holidays: May play from 9:00am to end of day

table.category: Juvenile Sons and Daughters of Full Members

cells.Tuesday: May play from 11:00am to end of day
cells.Thursday: May play before 8:40am and from 12:00pm to end of day
cells.Friday: May play before 9am then only with their Full or Life parent until 12:00pm and anytime after 1:00pm
cells.Saturday: May play from 11:00am to end of day
cells.Sunday: May play from 9:00am to end of day
cells.Holidays: May play from 9:00am to end of day

table.category: Guests of Full, Life, National, Non-Resident & Sub-Full Golf Members

cells.Tuesday: May play from 12:00pm to end of day
cells.Wednesday: May play from 9:00am to end of day
cells.Friday: May play from 1:00pm to 4:00pm. Only Family Guests from 9am until 12:00pm
cells.Sunday: May play from 9:00am to 12:00pm. Only Family Guests after 12:00pm
cells.Holidays: May play from 9:00am to 12:00pm. Only Family Guests after 12:00pm

table.category: Guests of Spouse Golfers and Associate Golf Members

cells.Tuesday: May play from 12:00pm to end of day
cells.Wednesday: May play from 9:00am to end of day
cells.Sunday: May play from 9:00am to 12:00pm. Only Family Guests after 12:00pm
cells.Holidays: May play from 9:00am to 12:00pm. Only Family Guests after 12:00pm

cells.Tuesday: May play anytime with a Scioto Golfer from 12:00pm to end of day
cells.Wednesday: May play unaccompanied before 11:00am. May play anytime after 11:00am with a Scioto Golfer
cells.Thursday: May play from 12:00pm with a Scioto Golfer until 4:00pm
cells.Friday: May play from 1:00pm with a Scioto Golfer until 4:00pm
cells.Saturday: May play from 12:00pm to 4:00pm with a Scioto Golfer
cells.Sunday: May play from 9:00am to end of day with a Scioto Golfer
cells.Holidays: May play from 9:00am to end of day with a Scioto Golfer
